signals.title: The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
signals.desc: When Apple employees interviewed for jobs at OpenAI, the AI startup's hardware head allegedly asked them to show up with something unusual: components they were working on and unreleased product samples. That's according to a blockbuster lawsuit filed by Apple, which accuses OpenAI of stealing confidential documents, spying on hardware prototypes, and tricking one of […]

signals.title: Build and publish web apps directly in ChatGPT
signals.desc: See how to build a working web app directly in ChatGPT. Describe what you want, try the first version, ask for changes in plain language, and publish it when it’s ready—with hosting and storage built in. Learn more: https://learn.chatgpt.com/ Chapters 00:00 Introducing Sites 00:21 Building a launch site 00:41 Refining with feedback 00:55 Annotating and publishing 01:09 Working with Build Web Apps

signals.desc: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.

signals.title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
signals.desc: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. signals.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
signals.desc: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

signals.title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
signals.desc: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. signals.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
signals.desc: Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, […]

signals.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
signals.desc: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

signals.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
signals.desc: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

signals.title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
signals.desc: New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature. The order blocks new environmental permits for data […]
